jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Jupiter Hospital
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Jupiter Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Radiologist to strengthen our Jabalpur-based team.

About Jupiter Hospital:
Jupiter Hospital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jupiter Hospital!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
